Class OutputStreamProofSaver

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.OutputStreamProofSaver
Direct Known Subclasses:
ProofSaver
public class OutputStreamProofSaver extends Object
Saves a proof to a given OutputStream.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected final String
    internalVersion
    Currently running KeY version (usually a git commit hash).
    protected final Proof
    proof
    The proof to save.
    protected final boolean
    saveProofSteps
    Whether the proof steps should be output (usually true).

    • OutputStreamProofSaver

      public OutputStreamProofSaver(Proof proof, String internalVersion, boolean saveProofSteps)
      Create a new OutputStreamProofSaver.
      Parameters:
      proof - the proof to save
      internalVersion - currently running KeY version
      saveProofSteps - whether to save the performed proof steps

  • Method Details

    • writeLog

      public StringBuffer writeLog()
      Write users and KeY versions to buffer.
      Returns:
      a buffer containing user and KeY version.

    • writeProfile

      public String writeProfile(Profile profile)

    • writeSettings

      public String writeSettings(ProofSettings ps)

    • save

      public void save(Path basePath, OutputStream out) throws IOException
      Throws:
      IOException

    • node2Proof

      public void node2Proof(Node node, Appendable ps) throws IOException
      Print applied rule(s) for a proof node and its decendants into the passed writer such that in can be loaded again as a proof.
      Parameters:
      node - the proof node from which to be printed
      ps - the writer in which the rule(s) is/are printed
      Throws:
      IOException - an exception thrown when printing fails
